goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 4' and should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the centre
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same area as the restaurant
The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
Make sure you get phone number
